 boolean allShipsSunk()
          Returns a bool based on if all of the values in the ship board is NOT B D or C or..

          Returns what is at a specific cell

          Checks if a cell is already occupied by a ship

          Checks if a coordinate is valid

Method Detail

allShipsSunk

public boolean allShipsSunk()
Returns a bool based on if all of the values in the ship board is NOT B D or C or.. == (!B and !D and !C) == !(B or D or C)

public java.lang.String getCell(int r,
                                int c)
Returns what is at a specific cell

isCellEmpty

public boolean isCellEmpty(int r,
                           int c)
Checks if a cell is already occupied by a ship

isValidPosition

public boolean isValidPosition(int r,
                               int c)
Checks if a coordinate is valid

printBoard

public void printBoard()
Loops thru the board and prints it. the first for loop is the top row # thing and the second for loop is the letters down the side (using chars) and the actual value within

updateCell

public void updateCell(int r,
                       int c,
                       java.lang.String value)
Updates a cell
